version.description: The version of the schema used

id.description: Unique identifier for the record. Must be stable across multiple extractions

source.description: The application source used to get this

startedAt.description: The date at which the lap started, in UTC time

endedAt.description: The date at which the lap ended, in UTC time

distance.description: Total distance travelled during the lap

avgPace.description: Average pace in minute per kilometer

avgHeartRate.description: Average heart rate during the exercise

exerciseId.description: The exercise this lap belongs to

deviceId.description: Unique identifier for the device linked to this record

title: Exercise metrics
description: Extra metrics recorded during an exercise
